referenceDevices.android: Pixel 8 hardware, Android 14, 60 Hz, release Hermes
referenceDevices.ios: iPhone 15 hardware, current supported iOS, 60 Hz, release Hermes

notes: Only same-device release-Hermes runs are comparable.
Host Node results characterize parser changes and never satisfy device budgets.
Dropped-frame and heap evidence must come from Android System Trace/Perfetto and Xcode Instruments, not Jest timers.
